files.content:
static:
  framework: jest
llm:
  strategy: code
  codeFramework: vitest
  model:
    id: primary-test-model
evalsDir: evals
skillsRoots:
  - skills
discoveryTargets:
  skills: true
  commands: true
manualChecklists:
  enabled: true
judgeModel: adjudicator-test-model

evals.expected_output: Scaffolding lands under evals pairing jest static artefacts with `@cursor/sdk` layers wired for vitest-oriented codegen harnesses while surfaced README segments highlight primary-test-model and adjudicator-test-model plus checklist markdown because stamping stayed enabled.

When approvals echo `discoveryTargets` limiting work to agents, generated rows omit counterpart slots for withheld kinds.
